property.name: collection_enabled
property.description: Enable or disable diagnostics collection. When false, no collection is performed.

property.name: auto_send_enabled
property.description: Enable or disable automatic bundle sending to support. When false, bundles are generated but not sent.

property.name: send_frequency
property.description: Diagnostics send frequency. Possible values: daily, weekly, monthly.

property.name: support_endpoint
property.description: Support endpoint URL for sending diagnostic bundles.

property.name: support_token
property.description: Authentication token for the support endpoint. Required when auto_send_enabled is true.

property.name: hdfs_path
property.description: HDFS path for optional bundle archiving.

property.name: hdfs_archive_enabled
property.description: Enable optional bundle archiving to HDFS. Local storage remains the primary storage.

property.name: log_paths
property.description: JSON list of log paths to collect (supports globs).

property.name: master_port
property.description: Listening port for the ODPSC Master server.

property.name: admin_username
property.description: Username for Basic Auth on the management API.

property.name: admin_password
property.description: Password for Basic Auth on the management API. Hashed with bcrypt at install time.

property.name: log_retention_days
property.description: Number of days of logs to collect.

property.name: max_log_size_mb
property.description: Maximum log size in MB to collect per file.

property.name: ambari_server_url
property.description: Ambari Server URL for metrics collection and command triggering.

property.name: ambari_username
property.description: Username for Ambari API authentication.

property.name: ambari_password
property.description: Password for Ambari API authentication.

property.name: cluster_name
property.description: Ambari cluster name.

property.name: api_key
property.description: Shared API key between agents and master for bundle upload authentication. Auto-generated at install time.

property.name: bundle_level
property.description: Default collection level. L1: configs+sysinfo, L2: +metrics, L3: +logs.

property.name: max_upload_size_mb
property.description: Maximum upload size in MB for an agent bundle.

property.name: max_bundle_size_mb
property.description: Maximum size in MB for an aggregated master bundle.

property.name: gunicorn_workers
property.description: Number of gunicorn workers for the master server.

property.name: audit_enabled
property.description: Enable audit trail for operations (bundles received, aggregated, sent). Disabled by default.

property.name: cluster_id
property.description: Unique cluster identifier. Auto-generated at install time. Do not modify.

property.name: attachment_otp
property.description: One-time password for attaching the cluster to SupportPlane. Generated by SupportPlane during attachment request.

property.name: supportplane_enabled
property.description: Enable sending aggregated bundles to the SupportPlane application. Requires supportplane_endpoint to be configured.

property.name: supportplane_endpoint
property.description: SupportPlane bundle upload URL (e.g. http://supportplane-host:8081/api/v1/bundles/upload).

property.name: supportplane_token
property.description: Optional bearer token for authenticating with SupportPlane.

property.name: ambari_ssl_verify
property.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when communicating with the Ambari server. Set to false for self-signed certificates.
